commands.cmd: python3 -m unittest tests.test_original_question_pipeline tests.test_scrape_pingt tests.test_scrape_presets tests.test_scrape_identity_keys tests.test_check_00_source_immutability tests.test_merge_source_identity tests.test_question_review_projection tests.test_convert_merged_to_firestore tests.test_upload_questions_to_firestore tests.test_question_review_workflow_catalog tests.test_documentation_structure

python3 -m py_compile scripts/common/requirements.py scripts/merge/patch_views.py scripts/merge/record_projection.py scripts/merge/00_merge_all.py scripts/convert/convert_merged_to_firestore.py scripts/upload/upload_questions_to_firestore.py tools/question_review_console/projection.py tools/question_review_console/workflow_catalog.py

summary: 05_originalizedを問題整備workflow、物理Merge、logical projectionの01前に接続した。独自問題はisOfficial=true、examSource=独自問題、examYear omitでconvert・uploadできる。取得元の問題文、選択肢一式の完全一致を拒否し、取得元解説・画像を引き継がず、公開用選択肢IDをpublic_question_idから再生成する。人工fixtureでsourceからupload projectionまでの非混入と、公式過去問の年度契約を同時検証した。
